backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for XpertLab backend defining all data types (UserProfile, Booking, Report, Attendance, etc.) and initializing persistent Maps for storage, access control, and authorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, covering pages, hooks, components, and utilities across patient, staff, and admin app sections.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme design tokens (colors, radius, sidebar, charts).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the XpertLab Vite app, setting the page title, favicon, and mounting the React root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component that configures TanStack Router with routes for AppSelectorPage, PatientApp, and StaffApp, wrapped in QueryClientProvider and ThemeProvider.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginScreen: Renders the main login screen with a hero section, feature grid (test booking, vitals, reports, security), and an Internet Identity sign-in button with loading/error states.
frontend/src/components/auth/PatientLogi: Patient-specific login screen using Internet Identity, displaying feature highlights and handling role errors when a staff account attempts to log in via the patient portal.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog for new users to complete their profile by entering name, phone, and optionally a staff role, then saving via the backend mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/auth/StaffLoginS: Staff-specific login screen with Internet Identity authentication, feature highlights, role error display, and demo mode buttons for phlebotomist, lab admin, and super admin roles.
frontend/src/components/demo/MockBottomN: Renders a non-navigating demo preview of the bottom navigation bar, showing role-specific nav items from roleNavConfig with interactive active-state highlighting.
frontend/src/components/demo/RolePermiss: Displays a table mapping application modules/features to role-based access permissions (patient, phlebotomist, lab admin, super admin) with check/cross icons.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Main app shell layout with a sticky gradient header (logo, notification bell, user avatar), a scrollable content outlet, and a bottom navigation bar.
frontend/src/components/layout/BottomNav: Renders a role-aware fixed bottom navigation bar using icon and route config from `roleNavConfig`, highlighting the active route with a gradient style.
frontend/src/components/layout/Notificat: Bell icon button that shows an unread notification badge and opens the NotificationDrawer on click.
Slide-in sheet drawer displaying a list of notifications with type icons, relative timestamps, and a mark-all-read action.
frontend/src/components/layout/PatientAp: Full-page layout wrapper for the patient portal with a sticky gradient header and a fixed bottom navigation bar for five patient routes.
frontend/src/components/layout/RoleGuard: Route guard component that redirects unauthenticated users to '/' and users with disallowed roles to their default path.
frontend/src/components/layout/ShiftGuar: Gate component for phlebotomist routes that checks for an active shift and redirects to the attendance page if none exists, while letting other roles pass through freely.
frontend/src/components/layout/StaffAppL: Full-page layout for staff with role-specific bottom navigation (phlebotomist, lab admin, super admin), a gradient header, and an optional demo-mode banner.
frontend/src/components/shared/GradientB: Reusable button component supporting primary gradient and outline variants with size options and a loading spinner state.
frontend/src/components/shared/LoadingSc: Full-screen centered loading screen that displays a pulsing logo and a configurable message string.
frontend/src/components/shared/MedicalCa: Simple card wrapper applying medical card styles with optional click handler and hover animation.
frontend/src/components/shared/Searchabl: Dropdown component for selecting a lab test with debounced search, paginated results, and a read-only selected-state display with a clear button.
frontend/src/components/shared/StatusBad: A React component that renders a styled badge for various status and severity types (e.g., pending, confirmed, high) using predefined CSS class mappings.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated identities, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: A custom hook that combines Internet Identity authentication state with the caller's backend user profile, exposing login/logout functions and loading states.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context provider and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, managing identity state, login/logout flow, and session persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useNotifications.ts: A custom hook that polls the backend every 30 seconds to generate in-memory notifications based on the user's role (patient, phlebotomist, or admin), and exposes unread count and mark-all-read functionality.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend data fetching and mutations, covering user profiles, tests, bookings, home collection requests, reports, and other domain entities.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that defines Tailwind CSS layers, CSS custom properties for the XprtLab medical brand (light and dark themes), and utility classes for gradients, cards, and status badges.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a single `cn` utility function that merges Tailwind CSS class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminAttendance: Admin page displaying real-time active staff shifts and shift history for phlebotomists, with elapsed time tracking and check-in location details.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminBookingsPa: Admin page for viewing, searching, filtering, and updating the status of all lab test bookings, with a link to upload reports.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminHospitalSa: Admin page for listing hospital sample records with billing details, supporting inline editing of payment information via a modal dialog.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminReportsPag: Admin page for browsing all uploaded lab reports with search, view, and download capabilities.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AuditLogsPage.t: Admin page that fetches and displays all audit logs in a paginated, searchable table with date range filtering. Supports filtering by action type, target document, or actor ID.
Admin page for creating a medical camp with name, date, and location fields, storing the result in localStorage and displaying a QR code with copyable camp ID upon creation.
frontend/src/pages/admin/IncidentsPage.t: Admin page that lists all incident reports fetched from the backend, with severity-based filtering and color-coded cards sorted by timestamp.
frontend/src/pages/admin/SecurityLogsPag: Admin page displaying security event logs (e.g., mock location, device mismatch) with filtering by event type and the ability to reset a user's device binding via a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/admin/UploadReportPag: Admin/staff page for uploading a PDF lab report to a patient by specifying their Principal ID and booking ID, with upload progress tracking and toast notifications.
frontend/src/pages/AppSelectorPage.tsx: Landing page that lets users choose between the Patient App and Staff App portals, displaying feature highlights and navigation cards for each.
frontend/src/pages/demo/RBACDemoPage.tsx: Displays an interactive RBAC demo page showing role metadata (Patient, Phlebotomist, Lab Admin, Super Admin) with descriptions, responsibilities, permissions table, and a mock bottom navigation preview for each role.
Patient page for browsing and selecting diagnostic tests with search filtering, toggle selection, price totaling, and navigation to slot selection.
frontend/src/pages/patient/HomeCollectio: Patient page for requesting home sample collection, supporting GPS-based address auto-fill via Nominatim, time slot selection, test selection, and form submission.
frontend/src/pages/patient/MyBookingsPag: Displays a sorted list of the patient's test bookings with status badges, test names, and slot times, with an empty state linking to booking.
frontend/src/pages/patient/MyHomeCollect: Displays a sorted list of the patient's home collection requests showing address, selected tests, slot time, and status badges.
frontend/src/pages/patient/MyHospitalSam: Shows hospital sample records linked to the patient's phone number, including a financial summary (total, paid, pending, discount) and individual sample cards with test details.
Displays the patient's recorded vitals (blood pressure and blood glucose) with placeholder values and an empty state message when no vitals have been recorded.
frontend/src/pages/patient/PatientHomePa: Patient home screen displaying a welcome banner, a grid of quick action cards (book test, home collection, reports, vitals), and shortcut buttons for bookings and home collections. Uses the caller's profile for personalized greeting.
frontend/src/pages/patient/ProfilePage.t: Profile page showing the logged-in user's account details (name, phone, principal ID, role) with a sign-out button that clears identity and query cache.
frontend/src/pages/patient/ReportsPage.t: Displays a sorted list of the patient's lab reports fetched via useGetMyReports, with view and download links for each report file.
frontend/src/pages/patient/SlotSelection: Allows a patient to pick a time slot for their selected tests, shows a summary with total price, and confirms the booking via useCreateBooking.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/AddHospi: Form for a phlebotomist to record a hospital sample collection, including patient details, test selection, billing/discount calculations, and payment mode, with a success confirmation state after submission.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/Attendan: Multi-step attendance check-in/check-out flow for phlebotomists that validates device fingerprint, GPS geofencing, and captures a selfie before starting or ending a shift, with security event logging.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/HomeColl: Displays a sorted list of home collection requests for phlebotomists, showing address, GPS coordinates, and status. Allows updating each request's status via a dropdown with optimistic feedback using toasts.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/MyHospit: Shows a phlebotomist's recorded hospital samples sorted by date, displaying patient name, phone, test name, status, and billing info. Includes a locked-billing notice and skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/Phleboto: Handles phlebotomist shift check-in and check-out with multi-step verification including device fingerprinting, GPS geofencing, mock-location detection, and selfie capture. Logs security events and tracks elapsed shift time.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/RecordVi: Provides a tabbed form for phlebotomists to record blood pressure (systolic, diastolic, pulse) and RBS (glucose) readings for a patient identified by principal ID and booking ID. Submits readings via mutation hooks and shows toast notifications.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/ScanCamp: Implements a QR code scanner using the device camera to log camp check-ins, displaying a live camera preview with a targeting overlay and listing scanned QR results. Handles unsupported browsers and scanning errors gracefully.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/TaskQueu: Displays a phlebotomist's combined task queue of bookings and home collection requests, sorted by timestamp, with status update controls and navigation buttons for QR scanning and vitals recording.
frontend/src/pages/staff/SubmitIncidentP: Provides a form for staff to submit incident reports with severity selection, description text, and optional photo upload with progress tracking.
frontend/src/PatientApp.tsx: Patient-facing app shell that handles Internet Identity authentication, profile setup, role validation, and client-side routing across all patient pages using lazy-loaded components.
frontend/src/StaffApp.tsx: Staff-facing app shell managing authentication, demo mode, role-based routing, shift-gated routes, and lazy-loaded pages for phlebotomists, lab admins, and super admins.
frontend/src/types/models.ts: Re-exports backend types and defines additional frontend-specific interfaces such as CartItem, CampEvent, CheckIn, NavItem, and RoleNavConfig.
frontend/src/utils/deviceFingerprint.ts: Provides device fingerprinting utilities that generate/persist a unique device ID in localStorage and parse the user agent to extract OS version and browser model.
frontend/src/utils/formatters.ts: Exports helper functions for formatting timestamps (date, datetime, time, relative), currency (INR), Principal strings, and generating unique IDs.
frontend/src/utils/geoHelpers.ts: Provides geolocation utility functions including haversine distance calculation, GPS accuracy validation, mock location detection, geofence checking, and speed-jump anomaly detection.
frontend/src/utils/roleConfig.ts: Defines per-role navigation configurations (nav items with labels, paths, and icon names) and a helper to get the default landing path for each AppRole.
frontend/src/utils/roleHelpers.ts: Exports boolean role-check helpers (isPatient, isPhlebotomist, isLabAdmin, etc.) and utilities to get a role's display label or default route path from a UserProfile.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utilities for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routing, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive parameters from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom colors (oklch CSS variables, brand blues/cyans), fonts (Poppins, Inter), border radii, box shadows, background gradients, and enabling dark mode via class. Includes typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file for XpertLab (a phlebotomist/lab mobile app), listing 8 pending feature requests (AR-1 through AR-8) all related to implementing a demo mode that bypasses GPS, device binding, shift guards, and backend calls while seeding mock data across staff and patient app screens.
